title: The Boys & Girls Guide to Getting Down
original_title: The Boys & Girls Guide to Getting Down
overview: Tongue-in-cheek look at 20-something singles clubbing and partying in L.A. Voice-over narration, charts and graphs, and visits to a research laboratory punctuate the story of a single night when groups of friends go out, drink alcohol, take drugs, dance and talk, and look for someone to go home with.
